name: Pacific Ridge Exploration Ltd.
description: Pacific Ridge Exploration Ltd. is a junior explorer focused on copper-gold porphyry deposits in British Columbia, with its flagship Kliyul copper-gold project located in the Quesnel Terrane hosting an inferred resource of 2.42 billion pounds copper equivalent across over 90 square kilometres. The company also holds the RDP copper-gold project (optioned to Antofagasta Minerals), and several additional copper-gold properties in BC. Pacific Ridge is an active exploration-stage company conducting systematic drill programs at Kliyul to expand the resource.
